chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-197 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge (s) Before; Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah 1. For orders on M.A. No.1131/2021. 2. For orders on office objections appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For orders on M.A. No.1132/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 16.02.2021. Mr. Tarique Hussain Magsi, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. The petitioner is a Primary School Teacher and he by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents to promote him as High School Teacher. Heard arguments and perused the record. The direction sought for by the petitioner for his promotion being public servant could not be issued by this Court under any pretext in exercise of its Constitutional jurisdiction, ignoring the bar contained by Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. In view of above, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the pending application. Judge Judge Muhammad Danish Steno* 2
